title: Shrink 001199 toward simpler 001189 two-seed RealMLP
summary: Blend a very small amount of the simpler two-seed RealMLP parent into 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Recreate the 001189 two-seed RealMLP core prediction without CatBoost correction. Set final predictions to 0.95 * pred_001199 + 0.05 * pred_001189. Do not add new models or calibration.
expected_effect: Reduce possible CatBoost overfit while preserving nearly all of the best parent ranking.
risk: The simpler parent may not improve public ranking and may only reduce CV.
